bots.name: Applebot
bots.description: Apple's web crawler, used to index content for Siri, Spotlight Suggestions, and Safari's search features.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 8_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/600.1.4 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/8.0 Mobile/12B410 Safari/600.1.4 (Applebot/0.1; +http://www.apple.com/go/applebot)

bots.name: Baiduspider
bots.description: Baidu's primary web crawler, fetching pages for Baidu Search indexing.

bots.name: Bingbot
bots.description: Microsoft's primary web crawler, fetching pages for Bing Search indexing.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; bingbot/2.0; +http://www.bing.com/bingbot.htm) Safari/537.36

bots.name: coccocbot
bots.description: Cốc Cốc's web crawler, fetching pages for the Vietnamese Cốc Cốc search engine. Separate web and image sub-bots share the same verification domain.

bots.name: DuckDuckBot
bots.description: DuckDuckGo's web crawler, used to improve DuckDuckGo's search results.

bots.name: Google special-case crawlers
bots.description: A group of Google crawlers that operate under separate agreements between the crawled site and a specific Google product (AdsBot, AdSense, Google Safety scanning, and similar). Several members of this group ignore the wildcard robots.txt rule and must be targeted explicitly.

bots.name: Googlebot
bots.description: Google's primary web crawler, fetching pages for Google Search indexing.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; Googlebot/2.1; +http://www.google.com/bot.html) Chrome/125.0.6422.26 Safari/537.36

bots.name: Kagibot
bots.description: Kagi's web crawler, fetching pages for the paid Kagi search engine. Kagi publishes a fixed, small set of source IPs rather than a CIDR feed.

bots.name: Marginalia
bots.description: The crawler behind Marginalia Search, an independent search engine focused on older, text-heavy, and non-commercial web pages. Identifies itself by a bare URL rather than a conventional bot token.

bots.name: MojeekBot
bots.description: Mojeek's web crawler, fetching pages for the independent Mojeek search engine index.

bots.name: Yeti
bots.description: Naver's web crawler, fetching pages for Naver Search indexing across South Korea's largest search engine.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; Yeti/1.1; +https://naver.me/spd) Chrome/106.0.5249.0 Safari/537.36

bots.name: PetalBot
bots.description: Huawei's web crawler, fetching pages for the Petal Search engine used in Huawei's mobile services.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 7.0;) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Mobile Safari/537.36 (compatible; PetalBot;+https://webmaster.petalsearch.com/site/petalbot)

bots.name: Qwantbot
bots.description: Qwant's web crawler, fetching pages for the privacy-focused Qwant search engine. Older crawls identify as Qwantify; current documentation uses the Qwantbot name.

bots.name: SeznamBot
bots.description: Seznam's web crawler, fetching pages for the Seznam.cz search engine used primarily in the Czech Republic.

bots.name: StractBot
bots.description: The crawler for Stract, an open-source search engine. Stract documents the crawler's user agent and robots.txt behavior but publishes no IP list or reverse-DNS verification method.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; StractBot/0.2; open source search engine; +https://stract.com/webmasters)

bots.name: YandexBot
bots.description: Yandex's primary web crawler, fetching pages for Yandex Search indexing.
